title: スライド作成skillはどうなった？
summary_text: 1. **Semantic gate can silently degrade to pass (false negative).** `runSemanticAdapter()` treats missing adapter, empty stdout, and non-JSON stdout as `warnings` only, never `errors`, so `passed` can remain `true` even when semantic linkage check is effectively disabled. [qc-pre-generation.js#L67](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L67) [qc-pre-generation.js#L69](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L69) [qc-pre-generation.js#L90](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L90) [qc-pre-generation.js#L98](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L98) [qc-pre-generation.js#L294](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L294) 2. **Adapter process failure code is ignored.** `spawnSync` result `proc.status` / `proc.error` is not checked; a failed adapter invocation can still be interpreted as non-blocking warning path, allowing QC pass with degraded semantics. [qc-pre-generation.js#L84](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L84) [qc-pre-generation.js#L88](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L88) [qc-pre-generation.js#L90](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L90) 3. **Source path validation is cwd-dependent (false failures in pipeline runs).** `image_source_path` is resolved via `path.resolve(...)` against current process cwd, not relative to the input JSON file location, so valid relative paths can fail in orchestrated runs. [qc-pre-generation.js#L159](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L159) [qc-pre-generation.js#L160](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L160) 4. **Tests do not verify fallback-risk branches introduced by local semantic fallback patch.** Unit tests only cover two semantic outcomes and never assert behavior for adapter missing/non-JSON/exit-failure paths, so the main regression surface is untested. [test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js#L43](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js#L43) [test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js#L68](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js#L68) 5. **Test harness may silently skip real adapter execution.** `withSemanticAdapter()` points to `~/Dev/fugue-orchestrator/...`, but runtime fallback candidates are different paths; if env path is absent, tests can still pass via local checks without proving adapter path behavior. [test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js#L22](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js#L22) [test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js#L26](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/test-unit-qc-pre-generation.js#L26) [qc-pre-generation.js#L60](/Users/masayuki/.codex/skills/slide/scripts/qc-pre-generation.js#L60)
